title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Kid, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Big Mom, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: "Damned punk" unleashed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AYA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You damn brats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What?! She wasn't blown away?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's not enough to put her down?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta be kidding me!! She's taking it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit!! The two of them are already at their limit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll let you choose your fate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When this attack is done ticking me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can either give me 50 years from your lifespans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OR YOU GAN LIVE ON AS MY SLAVES!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: life or...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Slave!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Crap! She's using soul pocus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Boss!! Maybe we should fall back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: gyaaah!! She's stealing our Lifespans too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She doesn't look like she's anywhere near death's door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a monster....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Captain!! We've gotta get outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys go ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You think the last gasps...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...of an old windbag scare me?!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: R-ROOM!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your death screeches are doing my ears in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Their souls aren't coming out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's an Emperor, and they're not scared at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Hold on tight, Mama!! I'll save you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Toss

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll handle this just like the man who saved my life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DANN Emperor! YOU JUST DON'T KNOW WHEN TO QUIT...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm sending you packing straight to hell!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
